name: Inbox Assistant — Email Ingestion

nodes.name: Fetch University Emails
nodes.notes: CONFIGURE: Change the label filter 'label:university' to match your actual Gmail label for forwarded university mail. Check Gmail settings to find the exact label name.

nodes.name: Write to Staging
nodes.notes: CONFIGURE: Update the path if your project is not in /home/jeroen/projects/inbox-assistant/

parameters.command: cd /home/jeroen/projects/inbox-assistant && source env/bin/activate && python src/fetch_and_triage.py >> logs/briefing.log 2>&1

nodes.name: Trigger Triage Engine
nodes.notes: OPTIONAL: This triggers the Python script immediately after writing to staging. If you prefer to let cron handle it on its schedule, disable this node.

_readme: Import this workflow in n8n via Settings > Import Workflow. See n8n/README.md for full setup instructions, credential configuration, and how to customise the Gmail label filter.
